testSuite: Licence Creation - Entitlement ID Errors and Post-Creation State
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page

testCases.title: Error shown when two Entitlement IDs share the same Component ID
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Fill in all required fields (Licence Name, Student Limit, Start Date, End Date)
Add Entitlement ID 21538
Add Entitlement ID 21400
Click the Review button
Click the Create button
testCases.expectedResult: Error message "Entitlement ID 21400 has the same Component ID projectworkkk as the following Entitlement IDs: 21538" is displayed

testCases.title: Error shown when Entitlement ID is linked to a Component that does not exist in comproDLS
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Fill in all required fields (Licence Name, Student Limit, Start Date, End Date)
Add Entitlement ID 21924
Click the Review button
Click the Create button
testCases.expectedResult: Error message "The Component ID r55practiceextraaaaaaaaaa linked to Entitlement ID 21924 is either invalid or does not exist" is displayed

testCases.title: Error shown when Entitlement ID does not exist or is invalid
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page

testData.entitlementId: A non-existent or invalid Entitlement ID (e.g. 00000)

steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Fill in all required fields (Licence Name, Student Limit, Start Date, End Date)
Add a non-existent or invalid Entitlement ID
Click the Review button
Click the Create button
testCases.expectedResult: Error message "The Entitlement ID XXXX is either invalid or does not exist" is displayed (where XXXX is the invalid EID entered)

testCases.title: Licence in Creating status shows correct UI state — status is Creating, Edit/Delete disabled, View Details enabled
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Fill in all required fields (Licence Name, Student Limit, Start Date, End Date)
Add Entitlement ID 18767
Click the Review button
Click the Create button (with no errors present)
Immediately observe the newly created licence row in the School Licences list view
Check the status badge on the licence row
Open the kebab menu (⋮) on the licence row
Check the enabled/disabled state of the Edit and Delete menu options
Check the enabled/disabled state of the View Details menu option
expectedResult: AC19a: The status badge on the licence row displays 'Creating'
AC19b: The kebab menu options 'Edit' and 'Delete' are DISABLED
AC19c: The kebab menu option 'View Details' is ENABLED

testCases.title: Error shown when Entitlement ID is already used in another school licence
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Fill in all required fields (Licence Name, Student Limit, Start Date, End Date)
Add Entitlement ID 18767 (which is already associated with another school licence)
Click the Review button
Click the Create button
testCases.expectedResult: Error message "Entitlement ID 18767 already exists in another school licence (ZZZZ)" is displayed (where ZZZZ is the name of the existing licence)

testCases.title: All relevant error messages are shown when multiple Entitlement ID errors are present simultaneously
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page

testData.duplicateEntitlementId: Any valid EID added twice (triggers AC4 inline error)

steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Fill in all required fields (Licence Name, Student Limit, Start Date, End Date)
Add a valid Entitlement ID, then attempt to add the same ID again — verify the inline duplicate error (AC4: "This Entitlement ID has already been added") appears
Add Entitlement IDs 21538 and 21400 (same Component ID, triggers AC13 error)
Add Entitlement ID 21924 (invalid component, triggers AC14 error)
Add a non-existent or invalid Entitlement ID (triggers AC15 error)
Add Entitlement ID 18767 (already used in another licence, triggers AC12 error)
Click the Review button
Click the Create button
expectedResult: AC4 (inline, before Review): "This Entitlement ID has already been added"
AC13 (after Create): "Entitlement ID 21400 has the same Component ID projectworkkk as the following Entitlement IDs: 21538"
AC14 (after Create): "The Component ID r55practiceextraaaaaaaaaa linked to Entitlement ID 21924 is either invalid or does not exist"
AC15 (after Create): "The Entitlement ID XXXX is either invalid or does not exist"
AC12 (after Create): "Entitlement ID 18767 already exists in another school licence (ZZZZ)"
